title: Crystal helper
description: Basically it a mod that helps improve the placement of your crystal in cpvp also you need https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu to configure he mod this is required and it basically just lets you know where best to place crystal read description for more info
body:
Also before you read the description on how this works you need [Mod menu (needed to configure and use the mod)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)                                                                                                   🔍 How It Works
When holding an end crystal, the mod outlines the block you're looking at with one of three colors:

🟡 Yellow – The best place to place your crystal. You’ll deal high damage with minimal risk to yourself.

🟢 Green – A risky placement. You’ll hurt your opponent, but you’ll take heavy damage too.

🔴 Red – The worst placement. It’s either ineffective or likely to backfire with little to no damage dealt or you cant place the crystal there

This simple mod helps players — especially those newer to CPvP — make smarter placement decisions in real time when doing crystal pvp 

✨ Features
Highlights only the block you're actively targeting

Color-coded outline system based where you should place your crystal

Activates only when an end crystal is held

A hud to configure the colors and placement detections
